title: I always thought anger meant being loud and aggressive. Whereas most of my life ...
description: I always thought anger meant being loud and aggressive. Whereas most of my life i always kept my anger in silence and preserved it like a weapon. And whenever i chose a third feeling or emotion in life, It had always caused me to fall harder. Wanted to know if its just me or are there more people who could relate to it. Hope this helps you find clarity.
